name: Cowboy Hot Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked whole kernel corn, drained
3 1/4 oz Can pitted black olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef in a skillet, breaking up the meat with a fork.
2. Add seasonings and diced tomatoes; simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in corn and olives.
4. Combine cornmeal, salt, and cold water; cook, stirring until thick.
5. Add chopped pimiento.
6. Line a greased, shallow 2-quart baking dish with part of the cornmeal mixture.
7. Pour in beef mixture and make a border of remaining mush around the edge of the baking dish.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
